spec.label: Bot
spec.name: log_bot
spec.query: All Bots : halo-bot|panda-bot|hudu-bot, HaloCommunityBot : halo-bot, PandaBot : panda-bot, HuduCommunityBot : hudu-bot

spec.label: Level
spec.name: log_level
spec.query: All Log Lines : .* , Warnings : \[WRN\], Errors : \[ERR\], Warnings + Errors : \[(WRN|ERR)\]

spec.label: Severity
spec.name: log_severity
spec.query: Warnings + Errors : WRN|ERR, Warnings Only : WRN, Errors Only : ERR

spec.label: Component
spec.name: log_component
spec.query: All Components : .*, YouTube Plugin : youtube, Halo Status : halo_status, Hudu Release : hudu_release, Heartbeat : heartbeat, Discord : discord, Star Citizen : star_citizen, Path of Exile : path_of_exile, Return of Reckoning : return_of_reckoning, Ashes of Creation : ashes_of_creation, Other : other

spec.label: Signal
spec.name: log_signal
spec.query: All Signals : .*, Connection Lifecycle : DiscordLifecycle, Gateway Noise : Gateway
